high_supportriskscore.rationale: Elevated support risk means unresolved friction. A proactive call before the customer escalates shows the company is listening and turns a negative signal into a loyalty moment. This is the Zappos / Chewy model.
high_supportriskscore.message_template: Hi [Name], I noticed you recently had an issue with your order and I wanted to personally reach out to make sure everything was resolved to your satisfaction.

high_recencysignal.rationale: High recency signal means the customer has not purchased recently. Personalised email referencing their last purchase category with a time-limited offer achieves the highest re-engagement rate for dormant customers.
high_recencysignal.message_template: We miss you! It's been a while since your last order. Here's 15% off your next purchase — valid for 7 days only.

low_engagementscore.rationale: Low engagement means the customer is not finding value in the product. In-app personalized recommendations (based on past purchases) re-establish the value proposition. Netflix uses this pattern for disengaged subscribers.
low_engagementscore.message_template: Based on your purchase history, you might love these new arrivals — curated just for you.

low_satisfactionscore.rationale: Note: in this dataset, SatisfactionScore 1=satisfied, 5=very dissatisfied. High SatisfactionScore values indicate dissatisfaction. Service recovery with a meaningful gesture (credit, apology, upgrade) has the highest retention rate for dissatisfied customers.
low_satisfactionscore.message_template: We're sorry your recent experience didn't meet your expectations. As a gesture of goodwill, we've added $20 credit to your account.

high_satisfactionscore.rationale: High SatisfactionScore (1-5 scale, higher = more dissatisfied) indicates active dissatisfaction. Direct call with service recovery is the highest-ROI intervention for this group.
high_satisfactionscore.message_template: We noticed your recent experience wasn't what we'd expect for a valued customer. I'd love to personally ensure we make this right.

high_complain.rationale: A recent complaint is the single strongest leading indicator of imminent churn. Immediate personal outreach to resolve the complaint and offer a goodwill gesture has the highest ROI of any intervention type.
high_complain.message_template: I'm reaching out personally because we take every customer concern seriously. I'd like to understand what happened and make it right.

low_tenure.rationale: New customers (low tenure) have not yet formed a strong brand habit. An early loyalty reward accelerates habit formation and increases switching cost. Amazon Prime's 30-day free trial is the canonical example.
low_tenure.message_template: Welcome to the family! As a valued new member, you've unlocked early access to our loyalty program — here's what that means for you.

low_stickiness.rationale: Low stickiness (infrequent sessions relative to purchases) suggests the customer is not developing a platform habit. Push notifications with highly personalised product recommendations during high-intent moments can restart the habit loop.
low_stickiness.message_template: Your wishlist items are flying off the shelves — grab them before they're gone!

high_discountsensitivity.rationale: Price-sensitive customers respond strongly to discount offers. Targeted discounts on their most-purchased categories have a significantly higher conversion rate than generic promotions.
high_discountsensitivity.message_template: Here's an exclusive offer just for you: 20% off your favourite categories this week only.

low_cashback.rationale: Low cashback earned suggests the customer is not engaged with the loyalty programme. Highlighting unused benefits and adding bonus points creates a loss-aversion effect that re-engages them with the platform.
low_cashback.message_template: Did you know you have unredeemed rewards waiting? Plus, we've added 150 bonus points to your account as a thank-you for being a loyal customer.

low_ordercount.rationale: Low order count with an active account suggests purchase hesitation. A targeted discount removes the price barrier and breaks the inactivity pattern, establishing the first purchase habit.
low_ordercount.message_template: You haven't placed an order in a while — here's 15% off to get started. No minimum spend required.

high_spendtrend.rationale: Increasing spend trend despite churn risk suggests a customer who values the product but may be comparison-shopping. A premium tier offer (exclusive benefits, priority service) locks in their spending with the platform.
high_spendtrend.message_template: Based on your shopping patterns, you qualify for our exclusive membership tier — with priority delivery, extended returns, and member-only deals.

default.rationale: Default recommendation when no specific risk pattern is matched. Loyalty rewards have the broadest positive effect across all customer types and risk profiles.
default.message_template: As one of our valued customers, we've added a special reward to your account. Here's what's waiting for you.
